---
title: "Tier 2 — Pre-Algebra & Algebra I"
subtitle: "Grade 8–9 · From the language of variables to the geometry of lines and the algebra of polynomials"
---

## What this tier is for

Tier 1 gave you the operations and the number systems. Tier 2 gives you
**the symbolic language** — functions, equations, inequalities, graphs,
exponents, polynomials — that lets you state and solve problems
involving *unknown quantities* and *changing relationships*.

By the end of Tier 2 you can:

- Read and write **functions**, evaluate them, and graph **linear
  functions** on the coordinate plane.
- Solve linear equations and inequalities; solve **systems of two
  linear equations**.
- Use **exponents** and **scientific notation** for very large or
  very small numbers.
- Apply the **Pythagorean theorem** and reason about **square roots**
  and irrational numbers.
- Add, multiply, and **factor polynomials**; solve quadratic
  equations by factoring.
- Reason about **similar shapes**, scale factors, and how dimensions
  combine.
- Recognise **arithmetic and geometric sequences** as the simplest
  forms of pattern.

## The lessons

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    A[01 · Functions as Machines] --> B[02 · Linear Equations]
    B --> C[03 · Linear Inequalities]
    D[04 · Coordinate Plane] --> E[05 · Linear Functions & Graphs]
    A --> E
    B --> F[06 · Systems of Linear Equations]
    E --> F
    G[07 · Exponents & Powers] --> H[08 · Scientific Notation]
    G --> I[09 · Square Roots & Irrationals]
    I --> J[10 · Pythagorean Theorem]
    G --> K[11 · Polynomials]
    K --> L[12 · Factoring Polynomials]
    M[13 · Similarity & Scale]
    L --> N[14 · Quadratic Equations]
    B --> N
    G --> O[15 · Sequences]
```

## Lesson list

1. [**01 · Functions as Machines**](01-functions-as-machines/index.qmd)
2. [**02 · Linear Equations in One Variable**](02-linear-equations-one-var/index.qmd)
3. [**03 · Linear Inequalities**](03-linear-inequalities/index.qmd)
4. [**04 · The Coordinate Plane**](04-coordinate-plane/index.qmd)
5. [**05 · Linear Functions and Their Graphs**](05-linear-functions-graphs/index.qmd)
6. [**06 · Systems of Linear Equations**](06-systems-linear-equations/index.qmd)
7. [**07 · Exponents and Powers**](07-exponents-powers/index.qmd)
8. [**08 · Scientific Notation**](08-scientific-notation/index.qmd)
9. [**09 · Square Roots and Irrationals**](09-square-roots-irrationals/index.qmd)
10. [**10 · The Pythagorean Theorem**](10-pythagorean-theorem/index.qmd)
11. [**11 · Polynomials**](11-polynomials/index.qmd)
12. [**12 · Factoring Polynomials**](12-factoring-polynomials/index.qmd)
13. [**13 · Similarity and Scale**](13-similarity-scale/index.qmd)
14. [**14 · Quadratic Equations (Intro)**](14-quadratic-equations-intro/index.qmd)
15. [**15 · Sequences (Intro)**](15-sequences-intro/index.qmd)

::: {.callout-note}
This page reflects the snapshot of `_curriculum.yml` at the time of build.
Lesson statuses there are the source of truth.
:::
